category_sources: source_facts.description says it wraps MP3 files; official homepage describes a command-line utility for wrapping multiple MP3s into one playable MP3.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and documentation use Mp3Wrap; source_facts.name is mp3wrap.
docs_sources: Official homepage lists HTML Man Page, FAQ, and Mp3Wrap Format as documentation.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page includes a Code tab for mp3wrap; source_facts.repo was empty.
tags_sources: Official homepage and man page describe a console utility that wraps MP3 files into one playable file.
